name: Divine Divinity
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the light corn syrup, sugar, water, and salt in a 3-quart saucepan.
2. Cook the mixture to the hard ball stage (260 degrees Fahrenheit).
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
4. Gradually add the boiling syrup to the beaten egg whites while continuously stirring.
5. Add vanilla extract and continue beating until the mixture can hold its shape when dropped from a spoon.
6. Gently fold in chopped nuts or candied cherries (optional).
7. Drop spoonfuls of the batter onto waxed paper to cool and set.
